runs.note: Implemented CORS configuration in handleCORS function to allow cross-origin requests from app.example.com and admin.example.com. Added origin validation, credentials support, proper headers, and Vary: Origin for cache poisoning prevention. Health endpoint excludes CORS headers as required.
